headline: PPG (PPG) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Before we begin today's call, I want to take a moment to remember our dear friend and colleague, John Bruno.  John was not only an exceptional contributor to our company, but a wonderful husband, father and friend whose leadership, intellect, compassion and human touched everyone who knew him.

headline: PPG Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Beat on Currency Gains
summary: PPG matched Q1 EPS estimates as revenues beat on currency gains and pricing strength, while reaffirming 2026 earnings guidance amid rising costs.
